subject: Annual Audit Findings - Action Items Required
body:
Team,

The external auditors have completed their review and flagged three items requiring immediate attention:

1. Revenue recognition timing on multi-year contracts needs adjustment per ASC 606. Impact: $1.2M restatement for FY2025.
2. Lease accounting under ASC 842 for the new office space needs to be recorded. Right-of-use asset value: $3.8M.
3. Stock-based compensation expense calculation has a minor variance of $180K that needs correction.

None of these are material weaknesses, but we need to address them before filing. Deadline is March 31st.

Please schedule time with your teams to review the detailed findings document.
